description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving and cabinet unit with a modern, modular design. The structure features a combination of open cubby shelves and closed compartments, some with solid doors in white and one with a gray textured finish. The main frame appears to be made of light wood or wood laminate, with the back and sides finished in a darker material. The open shelves are arranged in a staggered pattern, providing both storage and display space, while the closed sections offer concealed storage. The overall look is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or communal spaces. The construction suggests durability and a focus on both aesthetics and utility.
description: A tall, modern shelving and cabinet unit with a mix of open cubbies and closed compartments in wood and white finishes. Its modular design offers both display and concealed storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of open shelves and closed compartments, including white and gray doors.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, dark-colored panel with no visible shelves or compartments.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view, mostly in shadow, but the overall rectangular shape and some shelf outlines are visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing a solid, dark panel with no visible features.
